headline: Philip Morris International (PM) Wins First FDA Modified Risk Nod For ZYN Pouches
summary: Philip Morris International (NYSE:PM) received FDA modified risk authorization for its ZYN nicotine pouches. The decision allows the company to market ZYN in the U.S. with claims of lower health risk compared with cigarettes. This is the first time nicotine pouches have obtained modified risk status from the FDA. For Philip Morris International, the FDA ruling is a key regulatory event in its push toward smoke free products. ZYN gives the company a larger foothold in oral nicotine, a...
